articles.title: Paths carved into boreal peatlands for oil and gas exploration could be speeding up climate change: study
articles.description: Thousands of paths, known as seismic lines, carved into Canada's boreal peatlands for oil and gas exploration could be speeding up climate change, suggests a study from University of Waterloo researchers. In Alberta's boreal peatlands alone, these paths, found in B.C. and Saskatchewan as well, are long enough to wrap around the Earth nine times.

articles.title: From coal to cabernet: the wine seller using a flooded mine to cut heating bills
articles.description: Lanchester Wines in north-east England uses heat from a disused coalmine to maintain wine temperatures and with 23,000 flooded mines in the UK, there’s huge potential for more businesses and homes to follow its lead Shove them in a fridge, stash them in a cellar – this is how most people store their favourite bottles of wine. But if you have warehouses full of thousands of vintages, you have to think a little differently. For the last eight winters, Lanchester Wines has used heat from a disused coalmine to maintain ideal storage temperatures at its facilities in the north-east of England, helping to prevent freezing or spoilage. Continue reading...

Hamut in Peñablanca, Cagayan. The JC’s vine (Strongylodon juangonzalezii) is a critically endangered woody liana distinguished by dense

articles.title: Horoscope for Saturday, June 20, 2026
articles.description:
Moon Alert

There are no restrictions to shopping or important decisions today. The moon is in Virgo.

Aries (March 21-April 19)

A positive day

This is a pleasant day; nevertheless, you will have to put your own emotional considerations second to those of others. This doesn't mean you're being a martyr — it's simply meeting the situation as it is. That's life. You might receive an exciting health tip today.

Taurus (April 20-May 20)

A dynamic day

Enjoy warm relations with others today, especially children. Romance will be exciting and have greater emotional depth than usual. Social outings will appeal, particularly the arts, theater, museums, and sports.

Gemini (May 21-June 20)

A positive day

This is the perfect day to relax! Find a way to retire to your own private place so you can take it easy and enjoy the reassurance of familiar surroundings. A conversation with a female family member might take place. Enjoy the beauty of your daily world.

Cancer (June 21-July 22)

A positive day

You're chatty and eager to learn the latest gossip and catch up on news. Short trips, conversations with siblings, relatives and neighbors, and a chance to see new faces and places will please you. Enjoy shopping for something pretty for yourself and loved ones.

Leo (July 23-Aug. 22)

A positive day

Today you identify with something you own more than usual. You want to take care of it or admire it. (You certainly don’t want to lend it.) This is actually a good day for you to buy wardrobe items for yourself. You'll also enjoy active and competitive interactions with friends and groups.

Virgo (Aug. 23-Sept. 22)

A dynamic day

Things will tend to go your way today. Why not ask the universe for a favor? After all, you look fabulous because the sun is at the top of your chart casting you in a flattering spotlight. Say yes if you're asked to take on extra responsibilities because you'll shine! (A secret love affair might occur.)

Libra (Sept. 23-Oct. 22)

A positive day

Conflicting influences exist for you today. In one way, you want to hide and enjoy your own privacy (with good food and drink). However, another influence makes you want to get out there and fly your colors! In fact, you want to travel. It's your call.

Scorpio (Oct. 23-Nov. 21)

A positive day

Your emotional contact with friends is important to you today. You might even feel more protective or supportive than usual toward someone. Possibly, this same attitude applies to a group. This is also a good day to examine your overall goals in life. How well are you doing at the art of living?

Sagittarius (Nov. 22-Dec. 21)

A positive day

You are noticed today. In fact, some people will know personal details about your private life for some reason. Don’t worry about this. But do remember that you need more sleep right now. Be patient with partners and close friends.

Capricorn (Dec. 22-Jan. 19)

A dynamic day

Try to do something different today because you're restless for adventure. Obviously, travel would be an excellent choice. But if you can't travel, then explore your own neighborhood or your city. Meet new people. Learn new information through books, film and talking to others.

Aquarius (Jan. 20-Feb. 18)

A positive day

This is a pleasant time for you, which is why you want to socialize with others and explore fun outings. Relations with partners and friends are also reassuring and supportive. Today, discussions about shared property, taxes or debt might come up. You'll handle this.

Pisces (Feb. 19-March 20)

A positive day

Ideally, you have to go more than halfway when dealing with others to make everything copacetic today. (It's not a big deal.) Home and family are your focus right now. Relations with co-workers are especially rewarding — perhaps even romantic.

If today is your birthday

Actress Nicole Kidman (1967) shares your birthday today. You're curious, idealistic and can think on your feet. You're also outgoing, exuberant and intuitive. This is a year for wrapping up things and moving on because you are finishing a nine-year cycle. Take inventory of your life. Do some internal and external housecleaning. Commune with nature.

articles.title: Endangered flying fox nursing behavior documented in Cotabato
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Environment officials have documented a rare instance of nursing behavior between an endangered large flying fox mother and her pup during a wildlife monitoring activity in Cotabato earlier this month. The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR)-12 Community Environment and Natural Resources Office (CENRO) of Matalam recorded the behavior during semestral monitoring conducted from June 2 to 4, 2026. The observation offered a rare look into the reproductive life of the large flying fox (Pteropus vampyrus), an endangered species whose mating behavior was also documented in the same area in November 2025. Monitoring teams likewise counted [...]... Keep on reading: Endangered flying fox nursing behavior documented in Cotabato

articles.title: Tropical storm outside PAR slightly intensifies on Saturday morning
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Tropical storm Mekkhala (international name) intensified slightly as it approached the eastern part of Southeastern Luzon but was still outside the Philippine area of responsibility (PAR) on Saturday morning, the state weather bureau said. In its 11 a.m. bulletin, the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical, and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) said Mekkhala was last seen 1,590 kilometers east of Southeastern Luzon. READ: Cyclone outside PAR now tropical storm; rains seen in parts of PH It gained more strength as it was carrying a maximum wind speed of 85 kilometers per hour (kph) and gustiness of up to 105 kph. [...]... Keep on reading: Tropical storm outside PAR slightly intensifies on Saturday morning
